movie.actors: Kurt Thomas, Tetchie Agbayani, Richard Norton, Edward Bell
movie.plot: Johnathan Cabot is a champion gymnast. In the tiny, yet savage, country of Parmistan, there is a perfect spot for a "star wars" site. For the US to get this site, they must compete in the brutal "Game". The government calls on Cabot, the son of a former operative, to win the game. Cabot must combine his gymnastics skills of the west with fighting secrets of the east and form GYMKATA!
movie.title: Gymkata
movie.writer: Charles Robert Carner (screenplay by), Dan Tyler Moore (based on the novel "The Terrible Game" by)
